# box

**Instance Property**

The axis-aligned bounding box represented by the node.

## Declaration

```swift
var box: GKBox { get }
```

## Discussion

You can use this rectangle to find elements in the tree with the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKOctree/elements(in:)] method.

For more information, see [https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/General/Conceptual/GameplayKit_Guide/index.html#//apple_ref/doc/uid/TP40015172].
title: box
